checks.name: boundary-inclusion
checks.contract: coveredBy treats a shell point as inside

checks.name: observation-non-overwrite
checks.contract: record(o) appends evidence and preserves asserted position
checks.alternative: sensor value silently replaces the assertion

checks.name: scenario-isolation
checks.contract: assumptions execute on a cloned world
checks.alternative: assumptions execute on the source world

checks.name: inverse-cancellation
checks.contract: inverse sampled entry before the deadline cancels a leave monitor

checks.name: deadline-ordering
checks.contract: due timers fire before a move at the same timestamp
checks.alternative: same-time move cancels before timers are exposed

checks.name: sample-and-hold
checks.contract: sampled entry/exit depends only on consecutive memberships
checks.alternative: linear segment interpolation detects intervening boundary contacts

claimBoundary: Constructed sensitivity cases show that six declared policies change observable traces or modal state. They are mutation-adequacy checks, not evidence that each PULSE policy is universally preferable.
